What We Offer

Cleaning Services

From routine maintenance to deep, top-to-bottom transformations — tailored to your home and schedule.

Regular Residential
Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning to keep your home consistently fresh and spotless.
Most Popular
Deep Cleaning
A thorough top-to-bottom clean tackling every corner, baseboard, appliance, and surface in your home.
Recommended First Visit
Move-In / Move-Out
Start fresh or leave on the right note. Comprehensive cleaning for empty homes during transition periods.
Post-Renovation
Dust, debris, and construction residue removed so your newly renovated space shines like it should.
Kitchen & Appliance
Inside ovens, fridges, microwaves, and all surfaces — a full kitchen clean that restores hygiene and shine.
Airbnb & Short-Term
Quick-turnaround cleaning between guests. Consistent, hotel-standard results every time.

Professional Cleaning

Our Services

Every service is tailored to your needs. Based in Gatineau, QC — also serving Ottawa, ON and surrounding areas.

Regular Residential Cleaning

Scheduled cleaning visits — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly — to maintain a consistently clean and comfortable home.

Vacuuming and mopping all floors
Dusting surfaces, shelves, and furniture
Bathroom and kitchen cleaning
Trash removal and bed linen change
Deep Cleaning

A comprehensive, top-to-bottom cleaning session for those who need a reset — ideal as a first visit or seasonal clean.

Baseboards, door frames, window sills
Inside all appliances
Cabinet fronts, light switches, and outlets
Behind and under furniture
Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning

Start your new chapter in a spotless home, or leave your old one in perfect condition. We handle the full clean of empty spaces.

Full property cleaning, room by room
Closets, storage areas, and garage
Window cleaning inside
Rental deposit-ready standard
Post-Renovation Cleaning

Construction leaves a mess — we eliminate it. Drywall dust, paint residue, and debris removed with specialist techniques.

Fine dust and particle removal
Paint splatter and adhesive cleanup
All surfaces polished and protected
Kitchen & Appliance Cleaning

The heart of your home deserves special attention. We degrease, sanitize, and restore your kitchen to hygienic perfection.

Inside oven, microwave, and fridge
Stovetop, range hood, and filters
Sink, countertops, and backsplash
Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning

Fast, reliable turnaround cleaning for short-term rentals. Consistent hotel-quality results that protect your ratings.

Full property reset between guests
Linen change and bed making
Restock supplies checklist

About Me

Passion for Clean Spaces

With over 10 years of professional cleaning experience, I built The Cleaning Fairy on one simple belief: a truly clean home changes how you feel every day. Based in Gatineau, QC, I serve families and homeowners across the National Capital Region — including all of Ottawa, ON.

I take pride in my attention to detail, my reliability, and the relationships I have built with my clients. Many have been with me for years — because when you find someone who cleans your home like it is their own, you hold on to them.

Eco-Conscious — I use effective products that are safe for your family, pets, and the environment.
Fully Insured — Your home and possessions are always in safe hands.
Flexible Scheduling — Morning, afternoon, weekend — we work around your life.
